Headline: #62 Archer Temporary Reroute at  Archer/California
ShortDescription: #62 Archer buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Archer, California, Pershing and Archer due to street blockage near Archer/California.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#62 Archer buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Archer, California, Pershing, then resume their normal route on Archer.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Archer/California.
